data.body: S5: scenarios 1,2,3,4,7 proven live + harness built. BLOCKED on review-bot outage (bug pelt-mead-aeon): main@151c2b69 rebar.llm refactor broke .tickets-tracker setup -> no LLM-Review system-wide. Documented remediation = roll back compose-review-bot to :prev image (last-known-good, 33min old). Surfacing to user for go-ahead on shared-infra intervention.
